content: I recently worked on a C kernel module that relies heavily on netlink. While porting some low-level networking functionality to Rust, I discovered that there isn’t a no_std netlink library available for Rust. I found this, but it’s designed for userspace and doesn’t meet my requirements. Given that I’m relatively new to kernel development, I’m curious if a no_std netlink solution is already being developed, or if creating one would be a worthwhile effort. Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.
